data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. The core filter thresholds are correct, but the current plan does not explicitly cover every leaderboard-visible field derived in buildLeaderboard. Because the helper currently computes mean for margin and totalN from the full stats set, low-signal agents could still influence displayed output unless the plan requires recomputing all derived values from qualified entries only. Add explicit implementation and regression-test coverage for filtered mean/margin and filtered totals, plus the no-qualified-agents empty-step case.
